data.homepage_text: PERPTools â The Market Never Sleeps Platform How It Works Arena Security MCP Doc Launch App The Market Never Sleeps. Trade smarter with autonomous agents, real on-chain transparency, and CEX-grade performance â without giving up control. Launch App AI Arena Perps, refined. Speed of a CEX. Custody of a DEX. CEX-level performance Low-latency, high-throughput matching. Built for HFT and pro strategies. Full order suite Limit, Market, TP/SL, Post-only, IOC, FOK, Reduce-only. Everything you'd expect. Nothing you'd miss. Omnichain liquidity One orderbook. Multiple chains. Tight spreads, minimal slippage. Hands-on or hands-off Trade from your wallet. Or delegate to an agent vault. Always your call. Agents execute your rules. No magic. Your rules, defined once â running without you. The same cycle, every trade, every hour, every day. // 01 Signal Detection The agent reads every market â price, depth, funding, on-chain flow â across every timeframe, simultaneously. You'd need 12 screens. It needs none. // 02 Risk Assessment Before any entry, it calculates the worst case â position size, margin, expected drawdown â against your limits. If the math doesn't work, the trade doesn't happen. // 03 Order Execution By the time a human hits Confirm, the position is already open. Orders on-chain in under 8ms â before the price moves against you. // 04 Position Management Always in control. Never idle. The agent monitors, adjusts risk, scales positions, and exits with precision â 24/7, without hesitation. Agents don't sleep. The numbers prove it. Strategies run 24/7, markets don't wait. Here's what PERPTools agents have been doing. $0 M+ // Total Volume $0 K+ // Profits Realized 0 % // Win Rate 0 MS // Median Latency The leaderboard doesn't lie. Top agent last month: â â on a â notional. Owner slept through all of it. 7D 30D All Live Ranking # Agent P&L Win Rate Max DD Trades We never hold your funds. Ever. Execution runs on Orderly Network â the omnichain, non-custodial infrastructure powering $188B+ in cumulative perpetuals volume. Your keys, your coins, your trades. Your keys. Your coins. On-chain. PERPTools never holds your funds. Assets settle through Orderly's on-chain vault â you keep custody, you sign each grant, and you revoke access in one transaction . No intermediary stands between you and your position. Self-custodial One orderbook. Every chain. Live across every major chain through Orderly's shared liquidity â every fill, fee, and position clears through one unified book on-chain. Fake performance is mathematically impossible. $188B+ Cumulative Volume Audited. Battle-tested. Public. Orderly's contracts have passed multiple independent audits and already power trading for 1M+ users across the ecosystem. Every report is open. The protocol is the only counterparty. Multiple Audits Â· 1M+ Users The Platform Built for traders. By traders. PERPTools redefines perpetual trading with AI-powered automation , transparent execution , and a frictionless on-chain experience â all in one platform. Launch App AI Arena

How can I automate multi-market signal detection across different timeframes?
responses.raw_text:
```json
{
  "query": "Automate multi-market, multi-timeframe signal detection in PerpTools",
  "response": {
    "summary": "Automating multi-market, multi-timeframe signal detection with PerpTools requires a combination of PerpTools data access (API or SDK) and a scripting environment (Python, Node.js) with scheduling capabilities. The strategy involves defining signals, retrieving market data across timeframes, calculating signal conditions, and triggering actions based on the combined signals.",
    "steps": [
      {
        "step": 1,
        "title": "Signal Definition and Strategy",
        "description": "Define the specific trading signals you want to detect (e.g., moving average crossovers, RSI overbought/oversold, candlestick patterns).  Specify the markets and timeframes relevant to each signal. A well-defined strategy is crucial, outlining how signals from different markets and timeframes will be combined to form a trading decision.",
        "details": "Example:  A strategy might involve detecting an RSI overbought signal on BTC-PERP (1h timeframe) combined with a descending triangle pattern on ETH-PERP (4h timeframe). Consider the weight or importance of each signal. You might also want to consider filtering signals based on overall market conditions (e.g., high volatility, trading volume)."
      },
      {
        "step": 2,
        "title": "Data Retrieval with PerpTools API/SDK",
        "description": "Use the PerpTools API or SDK to fetch historical and real-time market data for each specified market and timeframe.  You'll need functions to query price data (open, high, low, close), volume, and potentially other indicators supported by PerpTools or calculable from the raw data.",
        "details": "Example (Python using a hypothetical PerpTools SDK): \n```python\nimport perp_tools\n\nbtc_1h_data = perp_tools.get_historical_data(market='BTC-PERP', timeframe='1h', from_time=start_time, to_time=end_time)\neth_4h_data = perp_tools.get_historical_data(market='ETH-PERP', timeframe='4h', from_time=start_time, to_time=end_time)\n```\nRefer to the actual PerpTools API

responses.question: What reporting mechanisms track my strategy's performance and risk metrics?
responses.raw_text:
```json
{
  "query": "reporting mechanisms for strategy performance and risk at PerpTools",
  "response": {
    "summary": "PerpTools provides several methods for tracking strategy performance and risk, including downloadable statements, portfolio analytics dashboards, and historical risk metrics.",
    "details": [
      {
        "mechanism": "Downloadable Statements",
        "description": "Statements detailing realized profit and loss (PnL), fees paid, and other financial data. Typically available in standard formats (e.g., CSV) for further analysis.",
        "metrics_tracked": [
          "Realized PnL",
          "Total fees",
          "Deposit (total)",
          "Withdrawal (total)"
        ],
        "availability": "Accessible through the PerpTools web interface."
      },
      {
        "mechanism": "Portfolio analytics dashboard",
        "description": "The dashboard aggregates key metrics related to your open and closed positions. It includes both simple and sophisticated metrics for evaluating strategy performance.",
        "metrics_tracked": [
          "Total P&L",
          "Open P&L",
          "Closed P&L",
          "Current equity",
          "Total fees",
          "Number of trades",
          "Win/loss ratio",
          "Return on investment statistics (ROI)",
          "Profit factor",
          "Sharpe ratio"
        ],
        "availability": "Accessible through the PerpTools web interface."
      },
      {
        "mechanism": "Historical Risk metrics",
        "description": "A historical time series of risk metrics are displayed on the Analytics page, including volatility, skewness, and kurtosis.",
        "metrics_tracked": [
          "Realized volatility",
          "Skewness",
          "Kurtosis"
        ],
        "availability": "Accessible through the PerpTools web interface."
      }
    ],
    "caveats": "The exact metrics available and the level of detail may vary depending on your account type and PerpTools' specific offerings. Check the PerpTools documentation or contact support for the most up-to-date information."
  }
}
```
